error_signature: Your request is invalid or could not be processed by the service
title: LinkedIn node API version issue
symptom: When attempting to post to LinkedIn using the LinkedIn node, the error 'Your request is invalid or could not be processed by the service' appears, indicating a version issue.
not_this_if: Using a later version of n8n (1.90.0 or higher)
root_cause: The LinkedIn API version specified in the node is deprecated or not active, leading to invalid requests. This often happens when the API version is not updated in the n8n LinkedIn node after changes made by LinkedIn.
fix_steps: Update n8n to version 1.90.0 or higher
If urgent, switch to the latest beta version (1.90.1) if using n8n cloud
agent_instruction: Update n8n to the latest version to resolve the LinkedIn node issue.
